Results for 'mountain hikes nature cable car viewpoints' in Innsbruck, Austria:
1. Innsbrucker Nordkettenbahnen [Mountain cable car] ⭐ 4.6 (5400 reviews)
   🕐 Open · Closes 7:15 PM
   📍 Rennweg 3
   "The cable car overcrowded Although view excellent"
2. Karwendelblick [Observation deck] ⭐ 4.9 (59 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Innsbruck, Austria
   "Incredibly expensive but well worth it for the great view!"
3. Lookout Mountain Park [Park] ⭐ 4.8 (8100 reviews)
   🕐 Open · Closes 5 PM
   📍 Golden, CO
   "Look out Mountain is must see the views are just breathtaking 😍."
4. Seceda Ridgeline [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (416 reviews)
   "Amazing views, the cable car is expensive but worthy."
5. Hafelekarspitze [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.9 (4200 reviews)
   🕐 Closes soon · 6 PM
   📍 Hafelekar 1
   "Breathtaking views and the cable car trip to the top is awesome."
